description_long: This object depicts a stylized humanoid figure with a futuristic, robotic appearance, featuring angular armor plating and a helmet with cat-like ears. The figure is posed dynamically, with limbs bent and extended as if in mid-motion, and is equipped with elongated, blade-like appendages attached to its arms and back. The body is segmented with visible joints, and the legs are clad in fitted armor with mechanical details, including a cylindrical device attached to the right thigh. The overall design is sleek and streamlined, with a combination of smooth and sharp surfaces, giving it an agile and combat-ready look. The head is fully enclosed by a helmet, obscuring any facial features, and the arms and legs are proportioned to suggest athleticism. The color palette is dominated by white, gray, and brown tones, with some metallic and dark accents.
description: A stylized, armored humanoid figure with a helmet, cat-like ears, and blade-like appendages, posed dynamically as if in motion. The design is futuristic and robotic, with segmented armor and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet with cat-like ears, chest armor, and both blade-like appendages extended outward, with the right leg slightly forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular arm and back blades, the helmet profile, and the bent left leg, emphasizing the dynamic pose.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the helmet, the attachment points of the blades, and the segmented armor on the legs, with both feet visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right arm and blade in detail, the cylindrical device on the thigh, and the forward-leaning posture.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored suit with helmet and blade-like accessories
attribute_posture: dynamic, action-oriented pose with bent limbs
